content.en:
"Father, I'm going to hunt the Forbidden Zerg too!"

Ye Xingchen came to Ye Tian and asked.

"Do you know how terrifying the strength of the Forbidden Zerg is?"

Ye Tian asked cautiously.

"Know!" Ye Xingchen nodded, "But I'm already a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and I'm qualified to hunt the Forbidden Zerg, instead of hiding behind to enjoy myself." Besides, I heard that killing the Forbidden Zerg can be sacrificed to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, so only by hunting the Forbidden Zerg can you grow faster!"

"Okay, I agree!"

Ye Tian nodded.

He knew very well that he should not restrict his son's growth, although if he didn't let his son go to the battlefield, there would be no danger, but how could such a Dao Ancestor grow up and rely on him for the rest of his life?

If he really did this, then his son's future would be completely ruined, and he might be sure to be promoted to Invincible Dao Ancestor, but he would lose the courage and hope to attack the half-step Domain Ancestor and the Domain Ancestor.

Therefore, he does not limit the decisions of his children.

If Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue are willing to go, then go!

Now, Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue have been cultivating in the Forbidden Void Realm for a long time, and their cultivation strength has reached the combat power of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor one by one, although it is far inferior to him, but it is also comparable to the powerful Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

Moreover, both of them have forbidden weapons and forbidden bodies, and the forbidden bodies have also reached the Dacheng level, but the Dao skills are a little worse.

If they join the battlefield, they don't need to face those powerful taboo zergs, they only need to face ordinary taboo zergs.

Soon after, Xiao Yue, Ye Yu, and daughter Ye Xingyue also came to find Ye Tian, and also explained that they wanted to enter the battlefield of the Forbidden Zerg and kill the Zerg.

Ye Tian also agreed, but he had a request, but he didn't want to participate in the battle first, but waited until he was clear.

Now, it is impossible for the major forces to send core geniuses to participate in the war, they must first send a part of the vanguard troops to find out some situations and find out the specific strength of the Taboo Zerg, otherwise if the strength is unclear, it would be absolutely idiotic to start a war with the Taboo Zerg rashly.

Time passed little by little, and the Heavenly Emperor Palace, Black Wind Mountain, and the half-step domain ancestors of the three Nine Heavens forces personally went to the Dark Forbidden Domain to understand the situation.

Then, a great battle broke out in the Dark Forbidden Realm.

The battle ended quickly, and the half-step domain ancestors withdrew from the dark forbidden realm one after another.

Not long after, Black Wind Mountain held a meeting, and this time the Eternal Dao Ancestor and Divine Ruin Dao Ancestor at the half-step Domain Ancestor level would appear, and all the high-level Black Wind Mountain leaders above the Heavenly King level would participate in the meeting.

The meeting was set on a small realm that had just been developed—the Small Realm of the King of Time!

This generation of time kings has fallen, but this small realm is not owned by this generation of time kings, but shared by generations of time kings, and it will not disappear because of the fall of a certain generation of time kings.

Previously, this realm was blocked, but now the minor realm has been unlocked.

A Heavenly King-level came to this small realm of the King of Time and quickly gathered together.

Ye Tian saw the Blood Demon Heavenly King and the Heavenly King who had been promoted to the Heavenly King, as for General Fengxing, he had already fallen, it was the last time he was more unlucky in Huoyan Forbidden Land, and he encountered those supreme Dao Ancestors slaughtering True Ancestors, and General Fengxing didn't even have any hope of asking for help, so he fell and died directly.

Ye Tian also knew about this matter after the fact, but he was helpless.

After all, I don't know how many Invincible True Ancestors have fallen, and examples like General Fengxing are just one of them.

Subsequently, Ye Tian also saw his master Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, and at this moment, the strength of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor had greatly improved, and he was already a Fivefold Heaven Dao Ancestor.

However, compared to Ye Tian, the strength of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was not worth mentioning.

It didn't take long for about tens of thousands of Heavenly Kings to gather here, and their strength was basically above the third or fourth Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

Moreover, this is definitely not all the Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain, after all, there are still Dao Ancestors among the legions under the command of many Heavenly Kings, there are even more Dao Ancestors under the command of the Ten Kings, and the Dao Ancestors under the command of the Half-Step Domain Ancestor are probably a very exaggerated number.

Therefore, there are many, many Dao Ancestors in Black Wind Mountain, maybe there are more than one million.

Wow!

The void rippled, and two Dao Ancestors appeared, and they were the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor.

"I've seen the Eternal Dao Ancestor!"

"I've seen the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor!"

One Heavenly King said respectfully.

After the Eternal Dao Ancestor quieted down the family, he spoke: "Before, I went to the Dark Forbidden Domain with the half-step domain ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, the Mitian Sect, the Heavenly Sea Sect, and the Ten Thousand Domains Divine Temple, and had a general understanding of the strength of the Forbidden Zerg, their strength is very strong!"

Being able to be said to be very strong by the Eternal Dao Ancestor shows that the Forbidden Zerg definitely has a lord-level Forbidden Zerg.

Eternal Dao Ancestor said again: "From the current situation, the Forbidden Zerg has six lord-level, more than fifty commander-level, and even more elite-level Forbidden Zerg, tens of thousands is not an exaggeration, while the ordinary Forbidden Zerg exceeds 10 million!"

"Don't be a Zerg!"

All the Heavenly Kings gasped.

This represents thousands of Dao Ancestors above the Triple Heavens!

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor almost had his pupils shrinking, almost shocked by the strength of the Forbidden Zerg.

In the past, there were not many Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors in the Dao Mountain Realm, at most there were hundreds, there were only twenty-three Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and one Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, adding up to only a few hundred people in total.

But there are tens of millions of forbidden zergs, and they are still being born.

Once the Forbidden Zerg rushed into the Dao Mountain Realm, with the power of the Dao Mountain Realm, it was not qualified to resist at all, and it collapsed in an instant.

If it weren't for the fragments of the Divine Heaven Realm descending on the Dao Mountain Domain, I am afraid that the Dao Mountain Realm would not be long before it would be invaded by the Forbidden Zerg, and after countless years, the Dao Mountain Realm would probably no longer exist, and it would be shrouded in the Dark Forbidden Domain again, turning into a part of the Dark Forbidden Domain.

"Eternal Dao Ancestor, if the Forbidden Zerg only has six lord-level, with the strength of our Xuanxu Ancient Realm, we should be sure to kill them, right?"

The Wind King asked.

He knew a little secret, there were definitely more than eight half-step domain ancestors in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and if most of the half-step domain ancestors were born, he would definitely be sure to destroy those six lord-level forbidden zergs.

"Can't be destroyed!" the Eternal Dao Ancestor shook his head, "Once those six lord-level forbidden zergs are injured, they will flee back to the forbidden zerg's lair space, and they will soon recover from their injuries and fight again." Moreover, we have only detected six lord-level forbidden zergs so far, which does not mean that there are only six lord-level forbidden zergs! More importantly, if we can't destroy the forbidden zerg nest, then we will never be able to destroy the forbidden zerg. "
